settings.title: What is it?
settings.content: Laushe's signature wellness formula is designed to support deep, restorative health through ancient tradtion and modern science.

settings.title: Who's it for
settings.content: Perfect for anyone looking to optimize their daily health routine with pure, raw, and bio-available supplements.

settings.title: Benefits
settings.content:
Helps reduce hair fall and strengthens roots effectively
Deeply nourishes and repairs dry, damaged hair strands
Enhances natural shine and leaves hair soft and smooth
Supports healthy hair growth with regular, consistent use
Soothes the scalp and keeps it hydrated and balanced
Made with 100% natural, Sunnah-blessed ingredients

settings.title: How to use
settings.content:
Spread a generous layer over your scalp and hair
Gently massage in small circular motions for 5–10 minutes
Allow it to sit for 2 hours or overnight for maximum effect
Rinse thoroughly with a mild shampoo

settings.promo_banner: BUY 1 GET 1 FREE - Sunnah-Blessed Hair Care

settings.heading: How to Apply Royce Hair Oil
settings.step1_text: Spread a generous layer over your scalp and hair
settings.step2_text: Gently massage in small circular motions for 5–10 minutes
settings.step3_text: Allow it to sit for 2 hours or overnight for maximum effect
settings.step4_text: Rinse thoroughly with a mild shampoo

settings.question: Is Royce Hair Oil safe for all hair types?
settings.answer: Yes, Royce Hair Oil is designed for all hair types, whether dry, oily, or normal. Its natural, Sunnah-blessed ingredients nourish without causing buildup, leaving your hair healthy and shiny.

settings.question: How often should I use Royce Hair Oil?
settings.answer: For best results, apply 2–3 times a week. Regular use strengthens hair, reduces fall, and promotes natural growth while keeping your scalp moisturized.

settings.question: Can it help with hair thinning or hair loss?
settings.answer: Absolutely. The blend of black seed, castor, and almond oils works to strengthen follicles, reduce breakage, and stimulate healthier, thicker hair over time.

settings.question: How long should I leave the oil on my hair?
settings.answer: For maximum benefits, leave it on for at least 2 hours or overnight. This allows deep penetration to nourish hair from root to tip.

settings.question: Will Royce Hair Oil make my hair greasy?
settings.answer: No. When applied correctly and washed with a mild shampoo, it leaves hair soft, shiny, and manageable without a heavy or greasy feel.

settings.headline: Unlock Daily Vitality
settings.subtext: Revitalize your hair with Royce Hair Oil for natural strength, shine, and overall hair health.
